goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack builder for BPK-086 release-governance handoff-prep metadata, requiring evidence and reviewer refs while keeping merge, external actions, GitHub, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not merge, create PRs, call GitHub, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Release-governance handoff-prep metadata can be bundled as operator-review evidence without merging or external action.
Evidence and reviewer refs are required for ready status.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Actual handoff execution, PR work, and merge require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked handoff-prep cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, external actions, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-086 prepared release-governance handoff metadata without merge or external action.
